allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\deepa\\AppData\\Local\\Temp" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".png",".jpg",".jpeg" } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\deepa\\.claude" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".png",".jpg",".jpeg" } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$locs = @\("C:\\Users\\deepa\\AppData\\Roaming\\Claude","C:\\Users\\deepa\\AppData\\Local\\Claude","C:\\Users\\deepa\\AppData\\Local\\AnthropicClaude","C:\\Users\\deepa\\AppData\\Roaming\\AnthropicClaude","C:\\Users\\deepa\\Pictures\\Screenshots","C:\\Users\\deepa\\Downloads"\); foreach \($l in $locs\) { if \(Test-Path $l\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $l -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in ".png",".jpg",".jpeg" -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-2\) } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length } }')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\deepa" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Where-Object { \($_.Extension -in ".png",".jpg",".jpeg"\) -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-30\) -and $_.Length -gt 50000 } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\deepa" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 2>$null | Where-Object { \($_.Extension -eq ".png" -or $_.Extension -eq ".jpg"\) -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddHours\(-3\) -and $_.Length -gt 100000 } | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Item "back_cover.jpg" | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-List')
